allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\GoDAM\\Documents\\chronograph; foreach \($d in @\('src/components','src/hooks','src/api','src/utils','src/constants'\)\) { New-Item -ItemType File -Force "$d/.gitkeep" | Out-Null }; Write-Host "gitkeep files created")

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -w "`nHTTP_STATUS:%{http_code} TIME:%{time_total}s" "https://chronograph-coral.vercel.app/api/year?year=1945" --max-time 60 -o api_response.json; Get-Content api_response.json -TotalCount 1 | ForEach-Object { $_.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $_.Length\)\) })

PowerShell(curl.exe -s -w "STATUS:%{http_code} TIME:%{time_total}s`n" -o $null "https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Special:EntityData/Q42.json" --max-time 20; $q2 = [System.Uri]::EscapeDataString\("SELECT ?x WHERE { BIND\(1 AS ?x\) }"\); curl.exe -s -w "`nSPARQL_STATUS:%{http_code} TIME:%{time_total}s" -H "Accept: application/sparql-results+json" -H "User-Agent: Chronograph/1.0 \(test\)" "https://query.wikidata.org/sparql?query=$q2&format=json" --max-time 30)
PowerShell($git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; & $git status; echo "---STAT---"; & $git diff --stat; echo "---BRANCH---"; & $git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
